data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of copying a link to share via any channel, but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case describes the generation of a temporary link, it does not provide any evidence that this link can be copied and shared through various channels. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to copy the generated link for sharing via any channel.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
